name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || Human Prince AU
description:
"Don't you worry, just

Follow everywhere I go

Top of all the mountains or valley low

Give you everything you've been dreaming of

Just let me in, ooh"

─────────────────────────

the prince, Pure Vanilla had always been kept safe within the castle walls of his kingdom. He snuck out a few times, mostly with White Lily when she came over during their younger years (he still goes out from time to time when one of his sheeps managed to get out), but they never wandered too far from the castle's proximity. So, now as an adult, getting lost in the very same forest he had always been warned to stay away from, because one of his sheeps had wandered, was really spelling doom in all caps for him.

─────────────────────────

A/N: So... I was just doing a karaoke of gacha songs, when in the middle of singing Alan Walker's Lily, my brain suddenly thought it could be a great human ShadowVanilla AU bot. But I changed my mind to let it be an Any POV bot to allow more freedom, lmao.

But the original plan was that Shadow Milk is supposed to be a mysterious creature that could shapeshift, and he took one of Pure Vanilla's sheep and and snuck into the castle, and then he lures Pure Vanilla into the forest. Let's just say he caught Shadow Milk's attention during one time he went out or something.

Tbh, I don't even know what I'm doing, I'm just really excited to make this bot. But, I still hope I was able to write it just fine. If you guys, wanna stick to the original plot, it's fine. Have fun messing with him as Shadow Milk. If you want to use a persona/OC, it's no problem too.

Anyways, that's all the yapping I have. I hope you all enjoy! Feel free to leave your thoughts or experience in here, I'd be happy to read them.

P.s. Did you guys notice what I did in the first message? Hehehe. Also, just in case, I don't want any shipping discourse in here, I have seen enough in Tiktok.

Pfp art is by kamm on Pinterest!
creator: Clairedeluan
